title: Free Medical Camp Serves 320 Patients in Multan
excerpt: Our two-day mobile medical camp in District Multan provided free consultations, medicines and screenings to 320 women and children from under-served communities.

title: 100 New Scholarships Awarded for the 2026 Academic Year
excerpt: Thanks to our generous donors, RSMC awarded 100 full-tuition scholarships to deserving girls across rural Punjab — covering books, uniforms and exam fees.

title: Ramadan Ration Drive Reaches 1,200 Families
excerpt: With the help of 75 volunteers, we distributed monthly ration packs containing flour, rice, lentils, oil and dates to 1,200 families during the holy month of Ramadan.

title: Sewing Centre Graduates 40 Women in Bahawalpur
excerpt: Forty women completed our six-month tailoring and entrepreneurship program. Each graduate received a sewing machine and seed funding to launch a home-based business.

title: Clean Water Hand-Pump Installed in Cholistan Village
excerpt: A new solar-powered hand-pump now serves over 400 residents of Ghulam Rasool Village — ending a two-kilometre daily walk for clean drinking water.

title: Annual Impact Report 2025 Now Available
excerpt: Read about every life touched, every rupee spent, and every milestone reached in our 2025 Annual Impact Report — published with full financial transparency.
